Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jing]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Jing is a person Cassias intends to follow to the top of the Truegolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan has cleared a way to marry Jing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Jing is a person Cassias was looking for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Naru Jing is the star of the Naru clan’s young generation.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Naru Jing has one eye and one wing replaced with glowing orange Remnant prosthetics.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Jing is the wife of Cassias.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Jing's right wing has an emerald green Goldsign of the Path of Grasping Sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Jing has a prosthetic orange-yellow wing made of madra created by Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Jing has an artificial left eye made from a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Jing uses wind madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Jing was formerly the top-ranked Highgold in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan spoke words to Cassias and Naru Jing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Jing was standing at the railing taking shots at distant enemies.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
